title: TestCaseFile
description: Schema for a Valory test case file. Each file is an array of test case objects covering one module.

id.description: Unique test case identifier in the format TC-MODULE-NNN (e.g. TC-AUTH-001).

title.description: Short descriptive name for the test case.

requirement_ids.description: One or more requirement IDs that this test case verifies.

type.description: Classification of the test by scope: unit, integration, or end-to-end.

category.description: Classification of the test by intent: positive (happy path), negative (error path), or edge (boundary condition).

preconditions.description: Ordered list of setup state required before the test runs. May be empty.

steps.description: Ordered actions to execute during the test. At least one step is required.

expected_result.description: Observable outcome that constitutes a pass for this test case.
